data.content: Implementation lives on branch worktree-foolery-54e9-live-plan-validation (commit 67a98229). Failure handling in scripts/test-plans-live.mjs categorizes errors by phase: (1) Network/server: dev_server_unreachable, non_json_response. (2) Request validation: request_invalid_repo_path, beat_selection_invalid, beat_selection_missing. (3) Planner runtime: planner_runtime_failed (agent CLI/auth/missing), planner_output_invalid (no tagged plan emitted). (4) Generic create: plan_create_failed. (5) Readback: addressability_failed. (6) Structure: structural_drift with per-issue kinds. (7) Persistence: persistence_check_unrunnable, persistence_missing, persistence_unreadable, persistence_taxonomy_drift, persistence_payload_missing. Every failure JSON includes category, message, hint, response excerpt, context (baseUrl, repoPath, beatIds), and devLogPath. The shell driver preserves the disposable repo on failure so kno show <planId> --json can be run against the captured state.
